title: Crossfit Gym Equipment | Functional Fitness Equipment | Fitness Factory
description: FITMUS is the Leading manufacturer of high quality crossfit gym fitness equipment including kettlebells, bumper plates, Bars, Plyo box,Wall balll, Gymnastic Ring, pull up rigs, storage rack for weightlifting, functional training in the fitness&bodybuilding industry, focus on functional movement to improve healthy&wellness.
bodyHtml:
Equipment for Crossfit | Functional Training | Commercial Gym

Full Effort is Full Victory!

View All Fitmus Product
Contact Us

Extensive  Products

8 categories and more than 50 kinds of products to meet your various needs of fitness products.

Professional to Fit Needs

Years of industry experience makes quick and professional response to your specific request.

Always Ready for New

In hot pursuit of fitness fashion and keep updated for our clients with latest product and market trends.

Diverse Product Chain For Your One-stop Purchased at Fitmus

So far our product range includes:

  • Casting Products line for kettle bell, dumbbell, Olympic weight plates and other free weights.
  • Wood Product line for wood plyo box, wood jerk box, wood push-up, wood gym rings, wood balance board.
  • Sew product Line for Leather sandbags, Wall ball, Bulgarain bag, Aqua bag, Medicine ball, power Bag.
  • Fitness product line such as Crossfit rig, Prowler sled, Power cage, Paralettes rack, battle rope, foam roller, latex band, etc.

Looking to equip a whole gym, do brand/retail business or place OEM order?

See what high quality products of wide range we got to satisfy your needs!

Ranges Of Fitness Products
  • Quality production to gurantee stable supply from batch to batch – consistant with ISO 9001 QC certificate
  • Professional with fitness equipment product – resonable quotation, strict quality control and guaranteed delivery time 
  • Familiar with fitness product supply chain to help clients easily get what needed with professional solution
  • Strick Quality Procedure with Comprehensive Standard – specific packing & report for each order by our QC
  • Wealth of Experience to efficiently process complex order, save time and effort for clients while controlling risks in a good way

WATCH OUR VIDEOS

It is a reminder of what we strive to be and how we are different to others in fitness industry. Visit our Youtube Channel to watch video of our products in action.

Watch the Video

Always Ready for New Comings

New Products

Developed in a long period, fitness industry is large but there are still 3% new products coming out every year and some of them become very popular soon. We also actively participate in R&D to make us more competitive and unique in the market. On the other hand, 1% products will eliminated as well. Our R&D will also try to test out better alternatives.

New Trends

Eco-friendly become a strong market trend in recent years. With people’s growing health awareness and higher and higher requirements on life quality , more will come. Focus on those trends, we also gonna share and use our findings to assure that each product is designed to enhance the value our clients cares.

New Speed

New sample and design drawings can be turned into real products within 3 weeks if profiles are adequate and production conditions are supported. This would be an attractive speed for clients who need fast market testing etc. We are also expecting sincere cooperation with our clients to create a new faster but more efficient speed.

title: About Fitmus
description: Fitmus is leading manufacturer of high quality fitness equipment, crossfit gym equipment including kettlebells, bumper plates, olympic bar, plyometric box, crossfit wall ball, pull-up rigs, power rack, slam ball, money bar, storage rack,etcfocus on functional movement to improve healthy&wellness
bodyHtml:
ABOUT FITMUS

HIGH-QUALIY FITNESS EQUIPMENT

FOR MAXIMUM PERFORMANCE

OUR START UP

Rizhao Fitmus Sporting Goods Co. ,Ltd is the manufacturer of high quality Crossfit Gym fitness equipment and Functional training accessories. We devoted ourselves to designing and manufacturing sporting goods with company’s sole concept of “ Full Effort is Full victory.” aspires to satisfy the need of customers who are looking for a reliable supplier and that gives them security to buy quality products.

Fitmus aims to achieve the highest standards in quality, value and performance through attention to details in design and manufacturing. We also spend much time and efforts on developing new products to keep up with the leisure trend, It is also our aim to maintain a close cooperation relationship and to offer the latest products combined with excellent service and a guarantee of competitive prices..

With good experienced in fitness industry, Fitmus has offered one of the widest arrays of products in the industry including multi-station gyms, free weight machines, a complete line of products, weight plates, kettlebells, dumbbells, and fitness accessories which are widely use at Crossfit affiliates, Garage gyms, PT studios, Bootcamps , Personal trainers, Cross fit Boxes, Fitness training center, Martial arts, Rehabilitation Center, Healthy clubs, commercial gyms, schools,Kickboxing, Martial arts facilities, Judo, Karate and more

We proudly announce the Grand Opening of the new 5,000 square foot production facility at Wulian Industrial Zone, Rizhao, Shandong Province, China. With the completion of the new factory, we expect to increase our production capacity by a factor of twice to three.

With excellent customer service, excellent product knowledge, reasonable prices and great business-to-business support we are to be the client trusted supplier in China.

Setting us apart from other fitness equipment supplier is that Fitmus is focus on its.

Contact Us NOW!

Performing Strictly Quality Control

We have a quality controller for checking the cargo’s quantity and quality for each order, also each order will have a clear packing report and quality report record for mark, we can follow and continue when do second order. Stable quality from batch to batch.

Good opportunity cross fit

 China has been developing stamping, Forging, casting and plastic injection Since 1961, etc. Take advantage of these industries, FITMUS supply very good cross fit products. Crossfit is being a popular activity in US, Europe, Australia since2008, Etc, our company like to dedicate to develop cross fit products and cross fit industry.

 Casting Foundry

Our casting foundry have Strict quality control and use the Gravity Cast for high quality Casting Blank. Such as Kettle bell, It has the good feature of a void free surface, single piece casting, a seam free handle and a textured finish, also with a machined  flat  base.

Strong market Sense

We are always concerning our client’s need and meet their requirement. We launched our competition kettlebell with Exclusive Inner Core Technology(ICT) in 2015.(Exclusive Inner Core Technology™ (ICT™) means NO fillers or welded bases.
It is the most revolutionary kettlebell design on the market with the good feature of Balance.

title: Contact us
description: Contact us for any inquiry of Crossfit Equipment, our staff will give you fast response and good service. Choose Fitmus Sport, Choose Reliable Partner
bodyHtml:
At Fitmus we believe that fitness equipment should feel a certain way, and the feeling is what guides us to do a company. Our equipment that is strong, giving the user a sense of comfort and confidence that helps them get a better workout.
We strive to create that same feeling of strength in our relationships with our customers; we want the relationship as strong as the machines themselves.
Working with Fitmus, you can choose from one of the most unique ranges of fitness equipment, combine this with our ability to customize and you’ll soon see how Fitmus can help you stand out among your competitors.

Get Connected with Fitmus on Your Social Platform!

We take pride in knowing that you’ll satisfied when you buy our equipment.
At Fitmus we’re passionate about being strong.

FITMUS – BE STRONG！

Our Location

Rizhao, Shandong, China

Address

Wulian County Industrial Area, Rizhao, 262300, Shandong Province, China

Our Contact Info

Tel: +86 15963097328 Fax: 0086-633-5889298 Email: info@fitmus-sport.com

Working Hours

Monday to Friday 8:30 am to 6:00 pm

Saturday 9:00 am to 2:00 pm pm

E-mail: info@fitmus-sport.com
